case_title: ALEXANDRA BREEDLOVE VS. CALIFORNIA RELOCATION SYSTEMS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - MISSING GREEN CARD. COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RELOCATION SYSTEMS
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BREEDLOVE, ALEXANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RELOCATION SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BREEDLOVE, ALEXANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RELOCATION SYSTEMS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRA BREEDLOVE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RELOCATION SYSTEMS IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
